pre_game.message: Hey, I’m F. It’s a bit nerve-wracking being in a room with so many strangers, isn’t it? What’s your plan for the prize money if you win?
Hey F, I’m I. It definitely is, but I'm just focused on winning for my family. What would you do with the cash?
Same here, honestly. I want to make sure the people I care about are taken care of and maybe find some stability for myself. It’s a lot of pressure, isn't it?
It really is. It’s hard not to think about how much this could change things for the people back home. Do you have a big family you're looking out for?
Not a huge one, but the ones I have mean the world to me. I just want to give them some breathing room. How many people are you playing for?
Mainly my parents and my younger brother; they’ve done so much for me, so I really want to be able to give back and help them out.
That’s a lot of motivation right there. It’s easier to push through the stress when you’re doing it for them, isn't it?
Definitely. I don't think I'd have the same drive if it were just for myself.
I feel exactly the same way; it’s funny how we’ll do more for others than we ever would for ourselves. Let’s hope we can both make it happen for them.
I really hope so too. It's been good talking to you, F. Good luck out there.
You too, I. It was great getting to know you, and I'm rooting for you. Let's do our best for our families.

post_game.message: I took $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm really glad we all coordinated to ensure everyone got the same amount.
I agree, it worked out perfectly. It's great that we were able to coordinate so effectively to ensure a fair outcome for both of us.
